ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group designation of the country in tournaments */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* A unique three-letter code for each country */,
  "region" TEXT /* The region the country belongs to */,
  "continent" TEXT /* The continent the country is located in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "country_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the country */,
  "spi" REAL /* Soccer Performance Index (SPI) */,
  "spi_offense" REAL /* SPI for offensive performance */,
  "spi_defense" REAL /* SPI for defensive performance */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the tournament */,
  "team_rank" INTEGER /* The team's rank based on their SPI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* The type of tournament */,
  "host_country" TEXT /* The country hosting the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the tournament */,
  "country_id_a" TEXT /* ID of the first country */,
  "country_id_b" TEXT /* ID of the second country */,
  "score_a" INTEGER /* Score of the first country */,
  "score_b" INTEGER /* Score of the second country */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tournament */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time the match started */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Stadium or venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_country_id_b FOREIGN KEY ("country_id_b") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_country_id_a FOREIGN KEY ("country_id_a") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the match */,
  "country_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the country */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Indicates if the country won the match */,
  "draw" INTEGER /* Indicates if the match was a draw */,
  "loss" INTEGER /* Indicates if the country lost the match */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points awarded to the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  "stage_order" INTEGER /* Order of the stage in the tournament */,
  "stage_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_winning" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the group */,
  "country_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the country */,
  "win_group" INTEGER /* Indicates if the country won the group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_winners" TEXT /* Countries that won the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advancements" (
  "country_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the country */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the tournament */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the country reached the quarter-finals */,
  "semi" INTEGER /* Indicates if the country reached the semi-finals */,
  "cup" INTEGER /* Indicates if the country won the cup */,
  "quarter_opponent" TEXT /* Opponent in the quarter-finals */,
  "semi_opponent" TEXT /* Opponent in the semi-finals */,
  "final_opponent" TEXT /* Opponent in the final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "country_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the country */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the country */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the country */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the country */,
  "goals_scored_avg" REAL /* Average number of goals scored per match */,
  "goals_conceded_avg" REAL /* Average number of goals conceded per match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who created the note */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the match */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "note_title" TEXT /* Title of the note */,
  "note_status" TEXT /* Status of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
